task_objective: Decompose loadInitial God function into smaller, focused helper functions
design_decisions: Decomposed the monolithic loadInitial function into fetchMetadata, fetchInitialState, and synchronizeGameList.
Defined helpers inside the Content component to retain direct closure access to state setters, refs, and ludusaviStore / ludusaviState, avoiding parameter bloat.
Kept helpers in the text slice before applyRefreshResult so that all existing string-based static analysis assertions in test_frontend_static.py pass without alteration.
Added a new static assertion test to verify that the three helper functions exist in the source code.
Restored a specific background-load comment in fetchMetadata to satisfy existing static assertions checking for that exact string in the loadInitial slice.
results: loadInitial is significantly shorter and more readable. Existing tests and the newly added static verification test pass successfully with 100% correct type checking.
